description: Search records in a folder by text query or record ID and return additive record metadata for authoring and debugging.

folder_id.description: NetHunt folder identifier. Discover valid values with `list_readable_folders` or `list_writable_folders`.
folder_id.title: Folder Id

limit.description: Maximum number of records to return.
limit.title: Limit

query.description: Free-text query string passed to NetHunt record search.
query.title: Query

record_id.description: Optional record identifier to look up directly through the search endpoint.
record_id.title: Record Id

name: search_records
